overview_001: MCET was established in 1998 to commemorate the 75th birthday of Arutchelvar Dr. N. Mahalingam.
overview_002: Founder Chairman: Arutchelvar Dr. N. Mahalingam (21 March 1923 – 2 October 2014). B.Sc., F.I.E. Founding visionary of Dr. Mahalingam College of Engineering and Technology.
overview_003: Current Chairman: Dr. M. Manickam, M.Sc., MBA. Graduated from the University of Michigan. Former President, All India Sugar Manufacturers Association (1996–1997) and India Sugar Technologists Association (2000–2002). Honored with Doctor of Science (Honoris Causa) by Tamil Nadu Agricultural University.
leadership_correspondent: Correspondent: Shri. M. Hari Hara Sudhan, B.E., MS. B.E. (Mechanical) from PSG College of Technology; MSc (Automobile Engineering) from University of Bath, UK. Correspondent since November 2012.
leadership_secretary: Secretary: Dr. S.V. Subramanian, MBA, Ph.D. Secretary of NIA Institutions; 25+ years in HR and Administration.
leadership_principal: Principal: Dr. P. Govindasamy, B.E., M.E., Ph.D. Principal and Joint Secretary of MCET; 30+ years in teaching, research, and administration.
leadership_vice_principal: Vice Principal: Dr. A. Senthil Kumar, B.E., M.E., Ph.D. Vice Principal for 11 years; expertise in Embedded Systems, VLSI Signal Processing, Industrial Automation.
leadership_dean_ri: Dean – Research & Innovation: Dr. S. Ramakrishnan, B.E., M.E., Ph.D. Registered Indian Patent Agent (Code: IN/PA 6069); 25+ years academic and research experience.

programs_ug_001: Undergraduate B.E./B.Tech programs at MCET: Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), CSE (AI & ML), CSE (Cyber Security), Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design and Technology), Electronics Communication (Advanced Communication Technology), Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Automobile Engineering, and Information Technology.
programs_ug_002: MCET's AI and Machine Learning offering is a specialization track within the Computer Science and Engineering B.E. program (CSE - AI & ML).
programs_ug_003: VLSI Design and Technology is offered as a specialization under Electronics Engineering at the undergraduate level.
programs_ug_urls: Undergraduate Department Pages: CSE (drmcet.ac.in/computer-science-engineering/), CSE - AIML (drmcet.ac.in/computer-science-and-engineering-aiml/), CSE - Cyber Security (drmcet.ac.in/computer-science-and-engineering-cyber-security/), AI & DS (drmcet.ac.in/artificial-intelligence-data-science/), ECE (drmcet.ac.in/electronics-communication-engineering/), VLSI Design & Technology (drmcet.ac.in/vlsi-design-technology/), Advanced Communication Technology (drmcet.ac.in/advanced-communication-technology/), EEE (drmcet.ac.in/electrical-electronics-engineering/), Mechanical (drmcet.ac.in/mechanical-engineering/), Civil (drmcet.ac.in/civil-engineering/), Automobile (drmcet.ac.in/automobile-engineering/), IT (drmcet.ac.in/information-technology/), Science & Humanities (drmcet.ac.in/science-and-humanities/).
programs_pg_001: Postgraduate programs at MCET: M.E. in CAD/CAM, M.E. in Embedded System Technologies, M.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, M.E. in Communication Systems, M.E. in Structural Engineering, and MCA (Master of Computer Applications).
programs_pg_002: MCET offers a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) postgraduate program. Department URL: drmcet.ac.in/computer-applications/
programs_phd_001: Ph.D. programs at MCET are offered in Mechanical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, and Automobile Engineering.
fees_ug_001: B.E./B.Tech tuition fees at MCET are approximately Rs.55,000 to Rs.75,000 per year, totaling roughly Rs.2.2 lakh for the full 4-year program.
fees_ug_002: Admission to B.E./B.Tech at MCET is based on TNEA or JEE Main scores. Eligibility requires 10+2 from a recognized board; specific subject and minimum percentage requirements may apply. Admission references: drmcet.ac.in/courses-offered/, drmcet.ac.in/eligibility/, drmcet.ac.in/cut-off-marks/.
fees_pg_001: M.E./M.Tech fees at MCET are estimated at under Rs.2,00,000 total for the program. This figure is unconfirmed/low-confidence and should be re-verified.
fees_pg_002: Admission to M.E./M.Tech at MCET is based on GATE or CEETA PG scores. Eligibility requires a relevant Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate marks.
fees_lateral_001: Lateral entry B.Tech in Information Technology at MCET costs approximately Rs.1.5 lakh total for the 3-year program.
fees_lateral_002: Eligibility for lateral entry admission at MCET requires a Diploma in Engineering, or a B.Sc. with Mathematics as a subject.
conflict_note_001: Department leadership details (HoDs) are manually entered and verified from the official MCET website (drmcet.ac.in) as of July 2026, while separate Teaching & Learning Centre (TLC) Coordinator names are retained for coordination roles.
